hero.heading: Pho, broken down to its molecules.
hero.subheading: Twelve-hour beef bone broth. Fresh-cut Thai basil. Banh mi rolls baked daily. Lake Forest's neighborhood Vietnamese kitchen since 2019.

about.heading: A modern lab for Vietnamese comfort food.
paragraphs: At Pho Lab we treat broth like a research project. Twelve hours of low simmer. Knuckle bones, oxtail, and toasted star anise. We taste it every two hours and adjust the salt.
Everything that touches the table is made within 24 hours of arriving at our door. Banh mi rolls from a baker in Westminster. Bean sprouts and Thai basil from Encinitas. Limes by the case.
Open every day until 10pm. Order online, dine in, or grab a quart of broth to take home. Either way — same recipe, same care, every time.

services.title: Pho Tai Nam
services.description: The classic. Rare beef and well-done flank in twelve-hour broth, with rice noodles, scallion and onion. Add sriracha at your own risk.

services.title: Pho Dac Biet
services.description: House special. Six cuts — rare beef, flank, brisket, tendon, tripe and meatball. Our most-ordered bowl.

services.title: Chicken Pho
services.description: Free-range chicken simmered in a lighter, clearer broth. Garnished with cilantro and a generous lime wedge.

services.title: Banh Mi Sandwiches
services.description: Pork belly, lemongrass chicken or tofu. House mayo, fresh cucumber, daikon-carrot pickle on a crisp baguette.

services.title: Vermicelli Bowls
services.description: Cool rice noodles, herbs, pickled vegetables, your choice of grilled meat. Topped with crushed peanut and nuoc cham.

services.title: Vietnamese Iced Coffee
services.description: Phin-brewed dark roast over sweetened condensed milk and ice. Strong enough to skip your next meeting.

reviews.name: Tuyet N.
reviews.text: Best pho in South OC. The broth is clean, deep, and never greasy. They actually skim it — you can tell.

reviews.name: Marco P.
reviews.text: Banh mi is a serious sandwich here. Crusty bread, real pickles, generous protein. Worth the drive from Mission Viejo.

reviews.name: Janelle K.
reviews.text: Friendly staff, quick lunch service, and they remember your usual after two visits. The dac biet is a must.

contact.address: 22641 Lake Forest Dr Ste B1-2, Lake Forest, CA 92630
contact.mapEmbedQuery: Pho Lab 22641 Lake Forest Dr Lake Forest CA 92630

seo.title: Pho Lab Lake Forest — Vietnamese pho and banh mi
seo.description: Twelve-hour bone broth, banh mi, and Vietnamese iced coffee. Open 10AM–10PM daily at 22641 Lake Forest Dr.
